meta_tags.description: Get everything you need to build a website your way. Wix’s free, easy-to-use website builder offers 2,000+ templates, built-in AI tools and a custom domain.
meta_tags.og_title: Your vision. Your goals. Your website. | Wix.com
meta_tags.og_desc: Get everything you need to create your website, your way. From an intuitive website builder to built-in business solutions and AI tools—try Wix for free.

headings: The new way to create a website
Flow between instant generation and hand-crafted design
Website templates are another way in
Prompt, ask, bounce ideas. We can do it all together. I’m your personal we
Add anything you need for your business as you go
Make your website official with your own domain name
Market your site from launch to scale
schema_data: {"@context":"https://schema.org/","@type":"HowTo","name":"How to create a website for free","description":"Follow these 6 simple steps to create a website today.","step":[{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Define your website goals","text":"Identify your needs and map out your audience, these will help you assess your site structure and the pages you want. A clear plan keeps your website design focused and your message consistent."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Choose a free website builder","text":"Find an all-in-one web creation platform that combines AI tools, design features and free hosting so you can create, manage and launch your site faster—no technical skills required."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Pick a domain name","text":"Choose a name that reflects your brand and is easy for people to remember. You can start with a free Wix domain and upgrade to a custom one when you're ready to take the next step."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Create and customize","text":"Start with a prompt or a template on an AI website builder, then customize using drag and drop or vibe-coding. Adjust layouts, colors, fonts, images and content to match your brand."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Optimize for SEO and mobile","text":"Make sure your website is mobile-friendly and easy to find on search engines. Add page titles, meta descriptions and alt text, and make sure your content is properly structured."},{"@type":"HowToStep","name":"Publish and grow your website","text":"Once your site looks good, publish it and go live. Then use built-in marketing tools, integrations and analytics to drive traffic, engage visitors and grow your online presence."}]}

{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"VideoObject","name":"Wix website builder","description":"Describe what you want and get a unique website in minutes.
